info.description: This is an API for the GoChat
info.title: GoChat API

delete.description: Deletes a guild. Only the guild owner can delete a guild. This removes all members, all guild icons, and all guild channels.

get.description: Returns banned users with optional ban reasons. Allowed for guild owner, administrators, or members with PermMembershipBanMembers.

parameters.description: Category ID (actually a channel with special type)
parameters.name: category_id

put.summary: Set channel role permission (create or replace)

post.description: Creates an icon placeholder and returns upload info. Only guild owner may create.

get.description: Returns a list of previously created icons for a guild. Only the guild owner may access this list.

delete.description: Deletes a guild icon. Only the guild owner may delete.

post.description: Bans a guild member with an optional reason. Allowed for guild owner, administrators, or members with PermMembershipBanMembers. Cannot target the guild owner. Members with administrator permission can only be moderated by the guild owner.

delete.description: Removes a guild ban. Allowed for guild owner, administrators, or members with PermMembershipBanMembers. Administrators can only be moderated by the guild owner.

post.description: Removes a guild member. Allowed for guild owner, administrators, or members with PermMembershipKickMembers. Cannot target the guild owner. Members with administrator permission can only be moderated by the guild owner.
Move a member to another voice channel and send them connection info (SFU URL + token). Requires administrator or PermVoiceMoveMembers.
Returns signaling path and a short-lived SFU token to connect to the SFU for this channel.
post.summary: Join voice channel (get SFU signaling info)

patch.description: Sets or clears preferred SFU region for a voice channel. Empty region clears override.

422.description: No SFU instances in requested region

get.description:
Response order depends on `direction`.
`before`: newest to oldest, including the `from` message when it exists. If `from` is omitted, the server starts from the channel's current `last_message_id`.
`after`: oldest to newest, including the `from` message.
`around`: the `from` message first, then older messages in descending order, then newer messages in ascending order.

parameters.description: Start point for messages. Included in the response when it exists.
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: Select direction and response order: before=newest->oldest, after=oldest->newest, around=from first then older desc then newer asc.
parameters.name: direction

200.description: Messages returned in the order implied by `direction`.

post.summary: Send user typing event in the channel
Set channel read state for current user

post.description: Uploads a file for an existing attachment. Stores the original as-is and generates a WebP preview for images/videos. Finalizes the attachment metadata.
Uploads an avatar image. Resizes to max 128x128 and converts to WebP <= 250KB. Finalizes avatar metadata.
Uploads and finalizes the binary payload for a previously created guild emoji placeholder.
Uploads a guild icon. Resizes to max 128x128 and converts to WebP <= 250KB. Only guild owner can upload. Sets guild icon and emits update.
Creates an avatar placeholder and returns upload info. Upload the binary to attachments service.

get.description: Returns a list of previously created avatars for the authenticated user.

get.summary: List all DM and Group DM channels for current user

post.summary: Send a friend request by discriminator

get.summary: Get or create DM with a user
Get current user settings (optional version gating)

post.summary: Update current user settings (replaces and bumps version)

post.description: Persist completed attachment metadata after upload
Updates channel TTL to keep it alive in system cache for next connections
Register or refresh SFU instance for discovery
Add client to voice channel participants list
Remove client from voice channel participants list

refresh_token.description: Refresh token. Used to refresh authentication token.

email.description: User Email to receive recovery email

refresh_token.description: Refresh token. Used to refresh authentication token.

channel_id.description: Channel ID the attachment was sent to

closed.description: Whether the thread is closed for new messages.

creator_id.description: For threads: user who created the thread

guild_id.description: Guild ID channel was created in

last_message_id.description: ID of the last message in the channel

member.description: For threads: current user's membership state when returned via HTTP.

member_ids.description: For threads: IDs of users who have joined the thread.

message_count.description: For threads: approximate stored message count.

participant_id.description: For DM channels: the other participant's user ID

permissions.description: Permissions. Check the permissions documentation for more info.

private.description: Whether the channel is private. Private channels can only be seen by users with roles assigned to this channel.

permissions.description: Default guild Permissions. Check the permissions documentation for more info.

channel_id.description: Channel id the message was sent to

flags.description: Bitmask. Includes suppress-embeds and banned-author markers in API responses.

nonce.description: Ephemeral client correlation token echoed only to the author.

position.description: Monotonic channel-local message position used for navigation.

reference_channel_id.description: Channel id of the referenced source message.

thread.description: Thread metadata when the message is linked to a thread.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last message edit

color.description: Role color. Will change username color. Represent RGB color in one Integer value.

permissions.description: Role permissions. Check the permissions documentation for more info.

position.description: Role position. Lower values are shown first in guild role lists.

timestamp.description: Optional ISO timestamp shown by the client.

url.description: Canonical URL opened when the embed title is clicked.

inline.description: Whether the field should be rendered inline.

flags.description: Media-specific flags from the source provider.

placeholder.description: Encoded placeholder used by some generated embeds.

position.description: Channel position in the list. Should be set as the last position in the channel list, or it will be one of the first in the list.

private.description: Whether the category channel is private. Private channels can only be seen by users with roles assigned to this channel.

parent_id.description: Parent channel ID. A Parent channel can only be a category channel.

position.description: Channel position in the list. Should be set as the last position in the channel list, or it will be one of the first in the list.

private.description: Whether the channel is private. Private channels can only be seen by users with roles assigned to this channel.

expires_in_sec.description: Expiration time in seconds. 0 means unlimited.

channels.description: List of channels to change order.

closed.description: Whether the thread is closed for new messages.

private.description: Whether the channel is private. Private channels can only be seen by users with roles assigned to this channel.

roles.description: List of roles to change order.

permissions.description: Permissions. Check the permissions documentation for more info.

attachments.description: IDs of attached files uploaded to the parent channel before thread creation.

embeds.description: Manual embeds for the first thread message.

nonce.description: Optional client correlation token for the starter message event.

embeds.description: Manual embeds supplied by the client. These are stored separately from generated URL embeds.

enforce_nonce.description: When true, deduplicates sends with the same nonce in the same channel for a short window.

nonce.description: Optional client correlation token echoed back to the author.

reference.description: Referenced message ID in the same channel. When set, the new message is stored as type 1 (Reply).

embeds.description: Full replacement for the manual embed array. Generated embeds are managed by the embedder service.

flags.description: Message flags bitmask. Use 4 to suppress URL embed generation and clear generated embeds.

x-enum-comments.ChannelTypeDM: DM channel. Can't be created in Guild
x-enum-comments.ChannelTypeGroupDM: Group DM channel. Can't be created in Guild'

channel_id.description: Channel ID to search in. Required.

content.description: Content contains a string to search for. Might be empty if need to search by other parameters.

has.description: List of specific features to search for.

mentions.description: Mentions contains a list of int64 user IDs.

page.description: Page number to get. Starts from 0.

pages.description: Total number of pages with current search parameters

joined_threads.description: Joined thread IDs grouped as guild_id -> parent_channel_id -> sorted thread ids.
